description_long: This is a large, modern sectional couch with a clean, angular design and a light gray or white upholstery. The couch is arranged in an L-shape, providing ample seating space and featuring a chaise lounge extension on one end. The seat and back cushions are thick, rectangular, and appear to be integrated into the frame, offering a streamlined look. The couch sits on short, block-style legs that are only slightly visible, giving it a low-profile appearance. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This piece is suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A large, L-shaped modern sectional couch with smooth, light upholstery and integrated cushions, featuring a chaise lounge and low-profile block legs.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the L-shaped configuration and the chaise lounge extension on the right side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full length of the couch, the backrests, and the continuous seating area.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth of the chaise lounge and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the sectional's overall length.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six seat cushions and five back cushions, all rectangular and integrated into the frame, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth upholstery with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs, slightly visible, likely made of wood or metal, providing a low-profile base.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, low-profile armrests with a rectangular shape, matching the overall modern aesthetic.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, attached backrests, divided into individual rectangular sections for each seat, with a smooth, cushioned appearance.
